5 #ifndef NUMERICS_CONDITION_WELLENUMERATOR_H
6 #define NUMERICS_CONDITION_WELLENUMERATOR_H
7 
8 #include "TwoPhaseFlowSimulation/BoundaryCondition/FolderEnumerator.h"
9 
10 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 
13 class WellEnumerator
14  : public FolderEnumerator<Law::ContainerKind::PartialVariable,
15  Law::ItemKind::Cell>
16 {
17 private:
18 
19  typedef FolderEnumerator<Law::ContainerKind::PartialVariable,
20  Law::ItemKind::Cell> Base;
21 
22 public:
23 
24  WellEnumerator(const Arcane::Array<Folder*>& folders,
25  const Arcane::StringArray& names,
26  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::PartialVariableCellReal*>& well_index,
27  const Arcane::ByteArray& is_flow)
28  : Base(folders, names)
29  , m_folders(folders)
30  , m_well_index(well_index)
31  , m_is_flow(is_flow) {}
32 
33  WellEnumerator(const WellEnumerator& e)
34  : Base(e)
35  , m_folders(e.m_folders)
36  , m_well_index(e.m_well_index)
37  , m_is_flow(e.m_is_flow){}
38 
40  const Folder& folder() const { return *(m_folders[index()]); }
41 
42  Folder& folder() { return *(m_folders[index()]); }
43 
44 
45  const Arcane::PartialVariableCellReal& wellIndex() const
46  {
47  return *m_well_index[index()];
48  }
49 
50  bool isFlow() const
51  {
52  return m_is_flow[index()];
53  }
54 
55 private:
56 
58  const Arcane::Array<Folder*>& m_folders;
59 
60  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::PartialVariableCellReal*>& m_well_index;
61 
62  const Arcane::ByteArray& m_is_flow;
63 };
64
